metadata.description: Skills for planning, building, code review, auditing, maintenance, shipping, assistance, and Obsidian

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: Issue drafting, analysis, triage, and full issue lifecycle skills

plugins.name: build
plugins.description: Git worktree management, conflict resolution, commit summaries, and findings fixes

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code review, cleanup, critical review board, and quality improvement skills

plugins.name: audit
plugins.description: CI, script, skill, and workspace auditing skills

plugins.name: maintain
plugins.description: Label sync, instruction file sync, permissions cleanup, lint migration, and comment auditing

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Release workflows and deployment tools for npm packages and Railway services

plugins.name: assist
plugins.description: External opinion and assistance tools including Codex CLI integration

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault organization and working document management skills

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end issue workflows that orchestrate analysis, planning, implementation, verification, and shipping
